h1.visual_description: Large, bold, sans-serif or slab-serif font, often used for part titles in the footer area.
h1.example_text: PART IV: SERIOUS GEOGRAPHIES OF PLAY

h2.visual_description: Medium-weight serif font, slightly larger than body text, used for figure titles.

h3.visual_description: Not explicitly present on this page; likely bolded serif inline or standard serif sub-headers.

visual_matchers.pattern: Full-width grayscale photograph followed by a numbered title and italicized descriptive text.
Italicized serif text immediately following a figure title.

markdown_grammar.citation_format: Author-date parenthetical citations (e.g., interview with Kaspori, 2007)

margin_noise_patterns.footer_left: Uppercase sans-serif text indicating Part/Section title.
